# mov2qt

`mov2qt` is a StackImport-owned C++23 QuickTime/MOV atom parser derived from
the public Kaitai Struct `quicktime_mov` schema.

- Upstream schema: `kaitai-io/kaitai_struct_formats/media/quicktime_mov.ksy`
- Upstream gallery: <https://formats.kaitai.io/quicktime_mov/>
- Schema license: CC0-1.0
- RPZA format notes: <https://wiki.multimedia.cx/index.php?title=Apple_RPZA>
- Cinepak format notes: <https://multimedia.cx/mirror/cinepak.txt> and
  <https://wiki.multimedia.cx/index.php?title=Cinepak>
- Local role: parse QuickTime/MOV atom structure, resource-fork `moov`
  metadata, sample tables, and clean-room legacy media decode experiments for
  Myst reverse-engineering reports.

The checked-in parser is intentionally hand-written instead of generated by
`kaitai-struct-compiler` so the repository does not need a Kaitai runtime or
generator dependency for normal builds. Keep field names and atom semantics
aligned with the schema where practical.
